topic: CP history for US negative GDP Q1-Q3 2026
summary: CP has been hovering near 27% threshold for weeks. Currently at 28% as of Feb 3.
content:
CP history analysis for question 40794 (post 41089):
- Late Dec 2025: CP dropped from ~73% to 25-30% range
- Jan 2-10: Drifted down to 23%
- Jan 10-19: Stable at 23-25%
- Jan 20-28: Gradually rose to 27-28%
- Jan 28 - Feb 3: Stable at 27-28%
- Most recent reading (Feb 3): 28%

The threshold for the meta question is 27%. CP has been sitting right at or just above 27% for the last ~2 weeks. It briefly dipped to 25% on Jan 25 but returned to 27% same day.

Key observation: CP is currently AT the threshold (27-28%), making this a close call.
